title: stelis sagittata
intro: Stelis sagittata, also known as the arrowhead stelis, is a type of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis sagittata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
